theme_and_archetype.description: Urban Dark Luxury. A street-smart, premium aesthetic blending the raw, high-contrast typography of streetwear brands (Off-White, Supreme) with the polished, moody precision of a high-end grooming lounge.

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300
navbar.logo: Use CSS text-shadow and linear-gradient to create a 'Chrome/Graffiti' effect for the text 'BONGIO'. (e.g. bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-zinc-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent). Ring it with a dark blue glow.
navbar.cta: White background, black text, bold uppercase.

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center relative overflow-hidden
hero.typography: Massive BONGIO BARBER overlapping the background. Use Anton font. Subtitles in mono.
hero.background: Dark concrete texture mixed with a subtle radial blue glow in the center. Heavy vignette.
hero.buttons: 3 buttons stacked or side-by-side. 1 Primary (Reservar Online), 2 Secondary (WhatsApp, Club Socios).

marquee.style: bg-zinc-900 border-y border-zinc-800 py-4 overflow-hidden flex
marquee.content: • CADA CORTE TIENE INTENCIÓN • LÍNEAS LIMPIAS • DESVANECIDOS FINOS • TERMINACIONES PROLIJAS • BONGIO BARBER ES ACTITUD •

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-2xl hover:bg-[#18181b] transition-colors duration-300 hover:border-white/10 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.interaction: Subtle translate-y-[-4px] on hover. Inner glow effect on hover using subtle_blue_glow.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:border-white transition-all

gallery.hover_effect: Images start with grayscale(100%) and low brightness. On hover: grayscale(0%), brightness(100%), subtle scale(1.05).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FRAMEWORK: Use React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion (for scroll animations/hover effects), and Lucide React (icons).

2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import Anton, Oswald, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.html or global css. Use Anton exclusively for massive headers (H1/Hero). Use Oswald for Section Titles. Use Manrope for Body.

3. HERO SECTION: Make it cinematic. The word 'BONGIO' should be massive (text-[12vw] or clamp) breaking the grid. Overlay the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy black/gradient scrim (bg-black/70 to bottom). Include the 3 requested buttons prominently.
4. MARQUEE: Implement a continuous scrolling marquee for the brand phrases to give it that streetwear/editorial feel. Use 'framer-motion' or basic CSS animations.

5. SERVICES: 9 Cards. Use the bento grid approach or a clean 3x3 grid. Cards must be dark (#121212) with 1px border. Hovering should reveal a subtle metallic or blue glow (box-shadow or inset border).
6. GALLERY: Create an Instagram-style masonry or tight grid. Apply the grayscale-to-color hover effect.
7. MEMBERS CLUB: Design a distinct 'VIP' looking section. Maybe use the 'texture_overlay' as a subtle background here. Highlight exclusivity.

8. LOGO: Since the real logo isn't provided as an image, build a CSS-only logo. Use 'font-anton text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-zinc-500' with a subtle text-shadow or a pseudo-element ring in dark blue.
9. DATA-TESTID: Ensure all buttons, links, and forms have appropriate data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='booking-hero-button').
10. ICONS: Use lucide-react for UI icons (Chevron, MapPin, Instagram, Phone).
11. SPACING: Be generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section spacing to maintain a premium, uncrowded feel.
12. BRAND COPY: Strictly use the provided Spanish copy ('En Bahía Blanca... arranca Bongio Barber.'). Do not invent new Spanish copy.
